requirement_topic.en: Electromagnetic Compatibility — Household Refrigerating Appliances (TR CU 020/2011 + GOST CISPR 14 series)
requirement_topic.zh: 电磁兼容——家用制冷器具（TR CU 020/2011 + GOST CISPR 14系列）
requirement_topic.zht: 電磁相容——家用製冷器具（TR CU 020/2011 + GOST CISPR 14系列）

summary.en: Household refrigerating appliances placed on the Armenian market must comply with Technical Regulation TR CU 020/2011 (On electromagnetic compatibility of technical means). The applicable harmonised standards are the interstate / GOST adoptions of the CISPR 14 series: GOST CISPR 14-1 (emission — requirements for household appliances, electric tools and similar apparatus, equivalent to CISPR 14-1) and GOST CISPR 14-2 (immunity — product family standard, equivalent to CISPR 14-2). These cover conducted and radiated disturbance limits and immunity for appliances including refrigerators, and are relevant to modern inverter-driven compressors and their switching electronics. Conformity is demonstrated by certification or a declaration of conformity issued by an EAEU-accredited body; EMC is typically covered together with low-voltage safety in a single EAC conformity assessment, and the EAC mark （ЕАС） covers both regulations.
summary.zh: 投放亚美尼亚市场的家用制冷器具须符合技术法规TR CU 020/2011（技术装置的电磁兼容）。适用的协调标准为CISPR 14系列的国家间/GOST转化版：GOST CISPR 14-1（发射——家用器具、电动工具及类似器具的要求，等同CISPR 14-1）及GOST CISPR 14-2（抗扰度——产品族标准，等同CISPR 14-2）。上述标准涵盖包括电冰箱在内器具的传导与辐射骚扰限值及抗扰度，并与现代变频压缩机及其开关电子设备相关。合格性通过EAEU认可机构出具的认证或合格声明予以证明；电磁兼容通常与低压安全一并纳入单一EAC合格评定，EAC标志（ЕАС）同时涵盖两项法规。
summary.zht: 投放亞美尼亞市場的家用製冷器具須符合技術法規TR CU 020/2011（技術裝置的電磁相容）。適用的協調標準為CISPR 14系列的國家間/GOST轉化版：GOST CISPR 14-1（發射——家用器具、電動工具及類似器具的要求，等同CISPR 14-1）及GOST CISPR 14-2（抗擾度——產品族標準，等同CISPR 14-2）。上述標準涵蓋包括電冰箱在內器具的傳導與輻射騷擾限值及抗擾度，並與現代變頻壓縮機及其開關電子設備相關。合格性通過EAEU認可機構出具的認證或合格聲明予以證明；電磁相容通常與低壓安全一併納入單一EAC合格評定，EAC標誌（ЕАС）同時涵蓋兩項法規。

standards_or_laws: TR CU 020/2011 — Technical Regulation of the Customs Union On electromagnetic compatibility of technical means (EAEU; EAC mark)
GOST CISPR 14-1 — Electromagnetic compatibility — Requirements for household appliances, electric tools and similar apparatus — Part 1: Emission (interstate adoption of CISPR 14-1)
GOST CISPR 14-2 — Part 2: Immunity — product family standard (interstate adoption of CISPR 14-2)

summary.en: China's EMC requirements for household appliances (including refrigerators) are primarily governed by GB 4343.1-2018 (Electromagnetic disturbance characteristics of household appliances, electric tools and similar apparatus — Part 1: Emission limits and measurement methods; mandatory, equivalent to CISPR 14-1:2016) and GB/T 4343.2-2020 (Part 2: Immunity — product family standard; recommended, equivalent to CISPR 14-2:2015). These standards are enforced under the CCC mandatory certification regime administered by SAMR/CNCA. Because both China's GB 4343.1 and Armenia's GOST CISPR 14-1 descend from the same CISPR 14 base, the technical content is closely aligned, but CCC test reports generated by CNAS-accredited Chinese laboratories against GB 4343.1 are not directly accepted as the basis for EAC conformity under TR CU 020/2011.
summary.zh: 中国家用器具（包括电冰箱）的电磁兼容要求主要依据GB 4343.1-2018（家用器具、电动工具和类似器具的电磁骚扰特性——第1部分：发射限值和测量方法；强制性，等同CISPR 14-1:2016）和GB/T 4343.2-2020（第2部分：抗扰度——产品族标准；推荐性，等同CISPR 14-2:2015）执行。上述标准在市场监管总局/认证认可监督管理委员会（SAMR/CNCA）管理的CCC强制认证制度下执行。由于中国GB 4343.1与亚美尼亚GOST CISPR 14-1同源于CISPR 14，技术内容高度接近，但CNAS认可的中国实验室依据GB 4343.1出具的检测报告，不被直接接受作为TR CU 020/2011框架下EAC合格的依据。
summary.zht: 中國家用器具（包括電冰箱）的電磁相容要求主要依據GB 4343.1-2018（家用器具、電動工具和類似器具的電磁騷擾特性——第1部分：發射限值和測量方法；強制性，等同CISPR 14-1:2016）和GB/T 4343.2-2020（第2部分：抗擾度——產品族標準；推薦性，等同CISPR 14-2:2015）執行。上述標準在市場監管總局/認證認可監督管理委員會（SAMR/CNCA）管理的CCC強制認證制度下執行。由於中國GB 4343.1與亞美尼亞GOST CISPR 14-1同源於CISPR 14，技術內容高度接近，但CNAS認可的中國實驗室依據GB 4343.1出具的檢測報告，不被直接接受作為TR CU 020/2011框架下EAC合格的依據。

standards_or_laws: GB 4343.1-2018 — Electromagnetic disturbance characteristics of household appliances, electric tools and similar apparatus — Part 1: Emission limits and measurement methods (mandatory; equivalent to CISPR 14-1:2016; enforced under CCC by SAMR/CNCA)
GB/T 4343.2-2020 — Part 2: Immunity — product family standard (recommended; equivalent to CISPR 14-2:2015)

gap.en: Although GB 4343.1 and GOST CISPR 14-1 share a CISPR 14 lineage, two gaps remain: (1) Conformity-route gap — the EAC conformity assessment under TR CU 020/2011 must be issued by an EAEU-accredited body; CNAS reports against GB 4343.1 cannot substitute and must be re-issued or supported by GOST CISPR 14 testing, with EMC normally bundled with TR CU 004/2011 safety in one EAC certificate or declaration. (2) Inverter-compressor models — modern refrigerators with variable-speed inverter compressors may generate emission phenomena whose coverage in existing GB 4343.1 test data should be verified against the GOST CISPR 14-1 emission test configurations before any attempt to re-use data through the CB / accredited-body route.
gap.zh: 尽管GB 4343.1与GOST CISPR 14-1同属CISPR 14体系，仍存在两项差距：（1）合格评定路径差距——TR CU 020/2011下的EAC合格评定须由EAEU认可机构出具；依据GB 4343.1的CNAS报告不能替代，须重新签发或以GOST CISPR 14检测予以支撑，且电磁兼容通常与TR CU 004/2011安全一并纳入单一EAC证书或声明。（2）变频压缩机型号——装配变频压缩机的现代电冰箱可能产生发射现象，应在尝试通过CB/认可机构路径复用数据前，核实现有GB 4343.1检测数据是否涵盖GOST CISPR 14-1发射测试配置的要求。
gap.zht: 儘管GB 4343.1與GOST CISPR 14-1同屬CISPR 14體系，仍存在兩項差距：（1）合格評定路徑差距——TR CU 020/2011下的EAC合格評定須由EAEU認可機構出具；依據GB 4343.1的CNAS報告不能替代，須重新簽發或以GOST CISPR 14檢測予以支撐，且電磁相容通常與TR CU 004/2011安全一併納入單一EAC證書或聲明。（2）變頻壓縮機型號——裝配變頻壓縮機的現代電冰箱可能產生發射現象，應在嘗試通過CB/認可機構路徑複用數據前，核實現有GB 4343.1檢測數據是否涵蓋GOST CISPR 14-1發射測試配置的要求。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — conformity to TR CU 020/2011 (via GOST CISPR 14 series) and the EAC conformity mark are required before placement on the Armenian / EAEU market; EMC is normally assessed together with TR CU 004/2011 safety
mandatory_status.cn: GB 4343.1-2018 is mandatory (GB) for CCC certification; GB/T 4343.2-2020 is recommended (GB/T); both enforced under CCC regime by SAMR/CNCA

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Conformity to TR CU 020/2011, demonstrated via GOST CISPR 14 testing, is mandatory for household refrigerators in Armenia and is normally covered together with TR CU 004/2011 safety under one EAC certificate or declaration. Chinese CCC EMC test data (GB 4343.1-2018) cannot be directly used; re-issuance through an EAEU-accredited body is required. Inverter-compressor models warrant particular attention to emission test coverage.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 通过GOST CISPR 14检测证明符合TR CU 020/2011，是家用电冰箱在亚美尼亚的强制要求，通常与TR CU 004/2011安全一并纳入单一EAC证书或声明。中国CCC电磁兼容检测数据（GB 4343.1-2018）不能直接使用；须经EAEU认可机构重新签发。变频压缩机型号尤须关注发射测试覆盖情况。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 通過GOST CISPR 14檢測證明符合TR CU 020/2011，是家用電冰箱在亞美尼亞的強制要求，通常與TR CU 004/2011安全一併納入單一EAC證書或聲明。中國CCC電磁相容檢測數據（GB 4343.1-2018）不能直接使用；須經EAEU認可機構重新簽發。變頻壓縮機型號尤須關注發射測試覆蓋情況。
